CustomField.description: MR Comp panel Ratio table ranges used by the system by default for this Aircraft Type. Format is: "Ratio From, Ratio To, Step"
CustomField.inlineHelpText: MR Comp panel Ratio table ranges used by the system by default for this Aircraft Type. Format is: "Ratio From, Ratio To, Step"
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2507 MR Ratio Table Ranges
